testcase.name: test_get_speaking_questions

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'part': 1, 'questions': ['Tell me about your hometown.', 'What do you do? Do you work or are you a student?', 'Do you enjoy your job/studies? Why?', 'What are your hobbies or interests?']}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_ielts_comprehensive.py:165: in test_get_speaking_questions assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'part': 1, 'questions': ['Tell me about your hometown.', 'What do you do? Do you work or are you a student?', 'Do you enjoy your job/studies? Why?', 'What are your hobbies or interests?']}, list)
